summary: Built the SprintFoundry marketing website in website-v1/ using Next.js 16 (App Router), TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS v4. Implemented all required sections: Hero with animated AgentOrbitDiagram (SVG hexagonal agent visualization cycling through agents), Features section with 6 agent cards (purple/blue/green/yellow/red/pink accent colors), How It Works 4-step pipeline with connecting flow, Pricing section with 3 tiers and Monthly/Annual toggle, plus SiteNav (scroll-spy + mobile drawer), StatsBanner (count-up animations), and Footer. Build passes TypeScript and Next.js checks cleanly.
issues: AgentOrbitDiagram uses emoji characters for agent icons inside SVG <text> elements; emoji rendering varies across platforms (Windows vs macOS). QA should test on Windows Chrome.
Framer Motion is installed but not used — animations are CSS-based. Available for future enhancement.
Pricing spec in .agent-task.md mentioned $49/mo for Pro with 10 tickets; the UI spec artifact specified $79/mo with unlimited tickets. The UI spec was followed as it was the direct design artifact.

metadata.tech_stack: Next.js 16 (App Router) + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4 + Lucide React + Framer Motion
